metadata.name: escape_from_delta
metadata.description: Escape from Delta on-chain raid game

accounts.name: difficulty_configuration
docs: when configured, this must match a program-owned difficulty account.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: The acting wallet is not authorized for this account or action.

errors.name: InvalidAccount
errors.msg: The account owner, mint, PDA seed, discriminator, or schema version is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidNumericRange
errors.msg: The requested numeric value is outside the allowed game range.

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: The checked arithmetic operation overflowed or underflowed.

errors.name: InsufficientFunds
errors.msg: The player has insufficient EDcoins or SOL for this action.

errors.name: StarterGrantAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: The player already received the one-time starter grant.

errors.name: RaidAlreadyActive
errors.msg: The player already has an active raid.

errors.name: InvalidRaidState
errors.msg: The raid state does not allow this transition.

errors.name: RaidTimedOut
errors.msg: The raid has timed out and must settle as failure.

errors.name: InvalidEquipment
errors.msg: The selected equipment is invalid for this raid.

errors.name: InvalidSafeCaseSelection
errors.msg: The selected safe-case item set is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidContainer
errors.msg: The selected container is invalid or already opened.

errors.name: InvalidListing
errors.msg: The marketplace listing is invalid for this action.

errors.name: InvalidDifficultyConfig
errors.msg: The admin difficulty configuration is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidRandomAudit
errors.msg: The random audit data is missing or malformed.
